channel.title: Portfolio on Alberto Eusebio
channel.description: Recent content in Portfolio on Alberto Eusebio

item.title: Team Policumbent: Software Engineering & Leadership
item.description: Embedded telemetry, IoT weather monitoring, and team leadership for the world's fastest human-powered vehicles.

item.title: Aurora
item.description: LLM-enabled mobile application for mental well-being tracking and guided reflection

item.title: Trustworthy CT Modeling for NSCLC Survival
item.description: Master thesis research in healthcare AI, computer vision, and trustworthy evaluation

item.title: Autonomous Grapevine Pruning (PIC4SeR / Yanmar)
item.description: End-to-end computer vision and robotics pipeline for autonomous agricultural pruning
